# JekyllNet

> Jekyll-style static site generator for .NET 10 — brings Jekyll/GitHub Pages workflows into the C# ecosystem.

JekyllNet is a .NET 10 static site generator that rebuilds Jekyll and GitHub Pages behaviours in C#. It supports front matter, layouts, includes, collections, posts, pagination, Sass/SCSS, multilingual AI translation, local preview, dotnet tool distribution, and reusable GitHub Actions. Current version: **0.2.5**. Runtime: **.NET 10**. License: **MIT**.

## Project Links

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/JekyllNet/JekyllNet): Source code, issues, and pull requests
- [Website & Docs](https://jekyllnet.help): Full documentation site (English and Chinese)
- [NuGet Package](https://www.nuget.org/packages/JekyllNet): `dotnet tool install --global JekyllNet --version 0.2.5`
- [GitHub Action](https://github.com/JekyllNet/action): `JekyllNet/action@v2.5`

- [Getting Started (ZH)](https://jekyllnet.help/zh/getting-started/): 安装与快速开始

- [Compatibility (EN)](https://jekyllnet.help/en/compatibility/): Jekyll/GitHub Pages feature compatibility matrix
- [Deployment / GitHub Pages (EN)](https://jekyllnet.help/en/github-pages/): Deploy to GitHub Pages with JekyllNet

- [AI Translation Guide](https://jekyllnet.help/en/blog/ai-translation/): Multilingual pipeline with OpenAI, DeepSeek, Ollama
- [Configuration Guide](https://jekyllnet.help/en/blog/configuration-guide/): `_config.yml` options reference
- [Feature Overview](https://jekyllnet.help/en/blog/feature-overview/): All supported Jekyll features

## Installation

```bash
# Install as a global dotnet tool
dotnet tool install --global JekyllNet --version 0.2.5

# Build a site
jekyllnet build --source ./my-site

# Local preview with live reload
jekyllnet serve --source ./my-site --port 5055

# Watch for changes
jekyllnet watch --source ./my-site
```

## GitHub Action

Minimal workflow using `JekyllNet/action@v2.5`:

```yaml
- uses: JekyllNet/action@v2.5
  with:
    source: ./docs
    destination: ./artifacts/docs-site
    upload-artifact: "true"
    artifact-name: docs-site
```

## Core Features

### Jekyll-compatible features (all implemented)
- `_config.yml` site configuration with defaults and `{{version}}` placeholder
- YAML Front Matter on pages, posts, and static files
- Layouts (`_layouts/`) with nested layout inheritance
- Includes (`_includes/`) with parameter passing
- Data files (`_data/`)
- Posts (`_posts/`) with date-based permalinks, tags, categories
- Collections with custom permalinks
- Drafts, future posts, unpublished pages
- Pagination with `per_page`, `path`, per-page disable
- Excerpts with configurable `excerpt_separator`
- Sass/SCSS compilation (entry file requires YAML Front Matter)
- Static file copying and front matter defaults
- `include`/`exclude` lists in config
- Site-level `permalink` fallback patterns

### Liquid template engine
- Tags: `if/elsif/else/endif`, `unless`, `for/endfor` (with `limit`, `offset`, `reversed`, `forloop` metadata), `assign`, `capture`, `case/when`, `include`, `comment`, `raw`
- Filters: `relative_url`, `absolute_url`, `markdownify`, `where`, `sort`, `map`, `compact`, `jsonify`, `slugify`, `replace_first`, `date`, `append`, `prepend`, `downcase`, `upcase`, `strip_html`, and more

### AI Translation Pipeline
Configure in `_config.yml` to auto-generate multilingual pages at build time:

```yaml
lang: zh-CN
ai:
  provider: openai          # openai | deepseek | ollama | any OpenAI-compatible
  model: gpt-5-mini
  api_key_env: OPENAI_API_KEY
  translate:
    targets: [en, fr]
    front_matter_keys: [title, description]
    glossary: _i18n/glossary.yml
    cache_path: .jekyllnet/translation-cache.json
```

Supports: OpenAI, DeepSeek, Ollama, and any OpenAI-compatible API. Features incremental translation, translation cache, and glossary/terminology control.

### Plugin System (Phase 5 — in progress)
- Plugin interfaces: `ILiquidTag`, `ILiquidBlock`, `ILiquidFilter`, `IJekyllGenerator`
- `_plugins/` directory auto-loaded at build time
- Roslyn-based dynamic C# compilation for plugins (`.cs` files compiled at runtime)
- Ruby-to-C# plugin transpiler (best-effort, for `.rb` plugins)
- BibTeX bibliography support: `{% bibliography %}`, `{% cite key %}`, `{% reference key %}`
- Parses `_bibliography/papers.bib`, injects `site.bibliography_entries` and `site.bibliography_by_key`

## Tested Themes

All six themes pass the full build matrix (`dotnet run --project scripts/JekyllNet.ReleaseTool -- test-theme-matrix`):

- [just-the-docs](https://github.com/JekyllNet/just-the-docs)
- [minimal-mistakes](https://github.com/JekyllNet/minimal-mistakes)
- [al-folio](https://github.com/JekyllNet/al-folio)
- [jekyll-theme-chirpy](https://github.com/JekyllNet/jekyll-theme-chirpy)
- [jekyll-TeXt-theme](https://github.com/kitian616/jekyll-TeXt-theme)
- [jekyll-theme-lumen](https://github.com/JekyllNet/jekyll-theme-lumen)

## Development Commands

```bash
# Run all tests
dotnet test ./JekyllNet.slnx

# Build the NuGet package
dotnet pack ./JekyllNet.Cli/JekyllNet.Cli.csproj -c Release

# Run the full theme compatibility matrix
dotnet run --project ./scripts/JekyllNet.ReleaseTool -- test-theme-matrix --max-parallelism 5
```

## Distribution

- NuGet `JekyllNet` dotnet tool
- `JekyllNet/action@v2.5` reusable GitHub Action
- winget manifest (see `packaging/winget/`)
- GitHub workflows: `ci.yml`, `github-pages.yml`, `publish-dotnet-tool.yml`, `release-artifacts.yml`

## Known Limitations

- Liquid edge-case semantics not fully aligned with Ruby Jekyll in all cases
- Pagination has some compatibility gaps vs. `jekyll-paginate`
- GitHub Pages plugin ecosystem not fully covered
- BibTeX/Scholar high-level features (grouping, full `@string` macro expansion) still in progress

## Repository Structure

```
JekyllNet.Core/       # Core build engine (C# library)
JekyllNet.Cli/        # CLI tool entry point
JekyllNet.Tests/      # Unit and integration tests
docs/                 # Documentation site source (built by JekyllNet itself)
sample-site/          # Sample site used as build regression fixture
themes/               # Git submodules for tested themes
scripts/              # Release and tooling scripts (C# / .NET)
action/               # GitHub Action definition
packaging/            # winget manifest and packaging helpers
```
